7908.one_line_summary: Hierarchical deterministic (HD) wallet derivation path standard for treasury management.
7908.notes: Specifies BIP-44 compliance with entity/department isolation for enterprise treasury systems.

7913.one_line_summary: Interface for verification of non-ethereum signatures via address-less keys.
7913.notes: Extends ERC-1271 to support non-ethereum cryptographic curves and signature schemes (secp256r1, RSA, email ZK).

7920.one_line_summary: Single signature scheme for multiple EIP-712 typed-data messages via Merkle tree.
7920.notes: Merkle tree approach enables batched signing with independent verifiability; addresses UX friction in multi-step approvals.

7929.one_line_summary: Asset-bound tokens permanently linked to other tokens with reveal activation mechanism.
7929.notes: Enables asset composability (digital identity, RWA, supply chain) with immutable binding; uses reveal instead of mint.

7930.one_line_summary: Binary format for chain-specific addresses supporting arbitrary blockchains via CAIP-350 profiles.
7930.notes: Compact, cross-chain address encoding; flexible for EVM and non-EVM chains; companion to human-readable ERC-7828.

7936.one_line_summary: Versioned proxy contracts allowing callers to select implementation at call time.
7936.notes: Maintains backward compatibility by exposing previous implementations; mitigates malicious upgrade risk.

7943.one_line_summary: Compliance interfaces for RWA tokens: forced transfer, freezing, and transfer authorization checks.
7943.notes: Minimal, unopinionated standard supporting ERC-20/721/1155; separates account eligibility from transfer-level authorization.

7945.one_line_summary: Fungible token interface hiding per-account balances for confidential transactions.
7945.notes: Enables privacy-preserving token transfers without revealing amounts; supports custom proof systems (Zether, ZK).

7946.one_line_summary: Unidirectional app-to-wallet protocol for batched transactions via QR/NFC without connection.
7946.notes: Privacy-preserving one-way communication; supports static and programmable modes for deterministic call generation on-chain.

7947.one_line_summary: Account abstraction recovery interface enabling access restoration via custom recovery providers.
7947.notes: Flexible recovery provider aggregation; integrates ZK proofs/2FA without mandating specific recovery mechanism.

7950.one_line_summary: String format encoding chain ID and transaction hash for cross-chain transaction lookup.
7950.notes: Simple, case-insensitive format: chainId:txHash:tx; enables direct blockchain explorer routing.

7955.one_line_summary: Permissionless, deterministic CREATE2 factory deployment across EVM chains via EIP-7702.
7955.notes: Uses publicly-known deployer private key with EIP-7702 delegation; mitigates front-running via repeated attempts.

7962.one_line_summary: Token ownership via key hashes instead of addresses for privacy and gas sponsorship.
7962.notes: Separates ownership from transaction initiator; supports one-time key use and fresh key rotation per transfer.

7964.one_line_summary: Standard EIP-712 signatures valid across multiple chains by omitting chainId from domain.
7964.notes: Array-based encoding of chain-specific operations; enables crosschain intents, governance, and account management.

7965.one_line_summary: Cryptographic proof-based cross-chain messaging attributes for ERC-7786 gateways.
7965.notes: Trustless verification via storage/state proofs; supports multi-hop routing and granular broadcasting via ERC-7930.
